title: Prometheus Remote Write Samples Dropped or Send Errors
app: Prometheus remote_write queue to Splunk/O11y backend
spl:
| mstats sum(_value) AS dropped WHERE index=prometheus metric_name="prometheus_remote_storage_samples_dropped_total" span=15m BY remote_name
| where dropped > 0
| sort - dropped
description: Dropped samples create blind spots in long-term metrics stores.
value: Ensures remote write paths stay healthy for compliance and SLO evidence.
implementation: Map `url` label to tenant; alert before queue persistence fills disk.
knownFalsePositives: Noisy periods after retention, target, or scrape changes. We compare with the Grafana or Prometheus view for the same minutes.
grandmaExplanation: We watch the metric stack and its limits so we notice scrape, storage, and query pressure before charts lie or go empty.
